summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified including new camera button, real Giphy GIFs integration, voice recorder UI, file upload, and emoji picker tabs. Firebase service account key moved from file to environment variable.

issues: React warning: Cannot update component while rendering different component (BrowserRouter/LoginPage) - cosmetic console warning only, does not affect functionality

backend_firebase_file_removed.details: /app/backend/firebase-service-account.json file does NOT exist (ls returns 'No such file')

backend_firebase_env_var_set.details: FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON env var is set in /app/backend/.env with full JSON credential

backend_firebase_initialized.details: POST /api/notifications/subscribe returns firebase_enabled: true - Firebase Admin SDK initializes from env var

backend_login.details: Login with konstantin_sabev@abv.bg / Banane.com returns token and user info

backend_voice_upload.details: POST /api/voice/upload accepts audio_data (base64) and duration, returns file_url

backend_file_upload.details: POST /api/upload accepts file multipart, returns file_url, file_id, file_type

backend_giphy_trending.details: GET /api/giphy/trending returns real GIFs from Giphy API with id, url, preview_url

backend_giphy_search.details: GET /api/giphy/search?q=cat returns GIFs matching search query

frontend_login_and_chat.details: Login with credentials redirects to /chat, Yordan conversation accessible

frontend_attachment_button.details: Paperclip icon visible in chat input bar with data-testid='attachment-btn'

frontend_camera_button.details: Camera button visible in chat input bar with data-testid='camera-btn'

frontend_emoji_picker_button.details: Emoji picker button visible with data-testid='emoji-picker-btn'

frontend_emoji_picker_tabs.details: Emoji picker has Emojis, Stickers, and GIFs tabs

frontend_gifs_tab_real_giphy.details: GIFs tab shows real Giphy GIFs (not emoji combinations), 20+ GIF images loaded

frontend_gif_search_input.details: GIF tab has search input with data-testid='gif-search-input'

frontend_giphy_attribution.details: 'Powered by GIPHY' attribution displayed in GIF tab

frontend_voice_button.details: Microphone button visible when input is empty with data-testid='voice-btn'

frontend_voice_recorder_ui.details: Voice recorder UI appears when clicking microphone button with start recording button

frontend_translation_selector.details: Language selector in header shows '🇧🇬 Български'

critical_code_review_comments: Firebase Admin SDK now initializes from FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON env var (server.py line 62-66), NOT from file
Firebase service account JSON file has been DELETED from /app/backend/
Camera button added to ChatLayout.jsx (line 1181-1190) with handleCameraCapture function using getUserMedia
EmojiPicker.jsx (line 79-94) now imports axios and calls /api/giphy/trending and /api/giphy/search for real GIFs
GIF search input with data-testid='gif-search-input' in EmojiPicker
VoiceRecorder.jsx provides full recording UI with start/stop/play/send buttons
FileUploader.jsx provides drag-and-drop file upload with preview
Giphy API key stored in backend .env as GIPHY_API_KEY
seed_data_creation: Used existing conversation with Yordan containing emoji messages
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features verified. Firebase service account key moved from file to env var (confirmed file deleted and env var set). Backend: voice upload, file upload, Giphy trending/search endpoints all working. Frontend: Chat input bar has all buttons (attachment/paperclip, camera, emoji picker, microphone). Emoji picker has 3 tabs (Emojis, Stickers, GIFs) with real Giphy integration in GIF tab. Voice recorder shows proper UI when clicking microphone. Translation selector in header works. Mobile code (React Native) cannot be tested in browser but API endpoints verified.
